_comment: Multi-turn quest catalogue (§4 of the event-subsystem plan). A quest is a multi-turn goal: a per-player step ARMS an eligible quest, the player works toward an AIM over many turns without violating a CONSTRAINT, and completing it grants a REWARD. Read by the Quests module (src/sim/quests.gd). QUEST RECORD SHAPE: { id (String), name (display), text (flavour), active (0-100 per-game inclusion percent rolled once at setup, like events; ship 0 to disable a quest whose core mechanic is unmodelled), weight (relative arming weight among the currently-eligible quests), prereq {…} (REUSES the event prereq vocabulary verbatim — Events.prereq_holds: tech_all/tech_any, building, civic, state_religion, resource_absent, min_pop/max_pop, min_era/max_era, at_war/at_peace, coastal, players_tech, tile, society, max_happy_resources, can_have_resource, min_water_fraction), aim {kind, …}, optional constraint {kind, …}, reward {effects:[…] OR choices:[{id,text,effects:[…],ai_prefer?}]} }. AIM kinds (Quests._aim_progress/_aim_complete): build_count {structure_id, count, weight_self?, also?, weights? (structure_id->multiplier, e.g. cathedral:4), since_arm?}; build_units {unit_types[], count}; build_fleet {composition: unit_type->count, all required}; cities_on_landmasses {count}; conquer_resource {resources[]}; spread_corp {count, snapshot-diffed}; own_corp_resources {}; control_named_tile {match}; conquer_holy_city {} (no holy-city settlement model — Crusade ships active:0). CONSTRAINT kinds (Quests._constraint_violated): never_switch_state_religion; keep_trigger_city (the player's capital at arming). REWARD effects REUSE the event effect verbs (Events._apply_effect): gold, culture, tech, unit, building, structure_yield, specialist, settle_great_person, spread_religion, golden_age, grant_promotion, reveal_resource, etc. A choices[] reward parks a non-skippable 3-choice popup reusing the event pending-choice machinery (AI auto-picks ai_prefer/first). Magnitudes are normal/standard; map-size & game-speed scaling is deferred (§5).

blessed_sea.name: Blessed Sea
blessed_sea.text: The seas part for the faithful. Found cities across many distant shores while keeping the true faith.

reward.text: Your maritime faith is legendary. Choose its blessing:

choices.text: Spread your state religion to twenty cities.
A temple rises in every great city.
A Great Prophet settles in your capital.

holy_mountain.name: Holy Mountain
holy_mountain.text: Pilgrims speak of a sacred peak. Raise temples and monasteries across the land until the mountain reveals itself and the faithful may settle its slopes.

horse_whispering.name: Horse Whispering
horse_whispering.text: Your riders have a gift with horses. Build stables to nurture the bond.

reward.text: The herds are yours. Choose your reward:

choices.text: Six Horse Archers rally to your banner.
All mounted units gain the Sentry promotion.
+1 food from every stable you own.

harbormaster.name: Harbormaster
harbormaster.text: Master the coasts: build harbors and a fleet of caravels.

reward.text: Your harbors hum with trade. Choose your reward:

choices.text: All naval units gain Combat I.
+1 gold from every harbor you own.
All naval units gain Navigation I.

classic_literature.name: Classic Literature
classic_literature.text: Your scholars yearn to fill great halls with the written word. Build libraries across your cities to nurture a golden age of literature.

reward.text: Your literary tradition is renowned. Choose its lasting legacy:

choices.text: +2 research from every library you own.
Recover the wisdom of the ancients (a free technology).
A great scholar settles in your capital (a free Scientist specialist).

master_blacksmith.name: Master Blacksmith
master_blacksmith.text: A renowned smith sets up shop. Build forges across your realm — but do not lose the city where he settled.

reward.text: The smith's craft is unmatched. Choose your reward:

choices.text: Prospectors reveal Copper in your lands.
All swordsmen gain the Shock promotion.
A master engineer joins your capital (a free Engineer specialist).

best_defense.name: Best Defense
best_defense.text: Your engineers perfect the art of fortification. Build castles to make your cities impregnable.

reward.text: Your defenses are the envy of the world. Choose your reward:

choices.text: All melee units gain City Garrison I.
+3 attitude with every civilization you have met.
Your watchtowers gather intelligence (+espionage points).

sports_league.name: Sports League
sports_league.text: The crowds clamour for games. Build colosseums to keep the people roaring.

reward.text: The games unite your people. Choose your reward:

choices.text: +1 happiness from every colosseum you own.
+4 culture from every colosseum you own.
Declare a festival — a Golden Age!

crusade.name: Crusade
crusade.text: The Holy City lies in infidel hands. Take up the cross and conquer it for the faith.

reward.text: The Holy City is liberated! Choose your reward:

choices.text: Four conscripts join the holy war.
Build a shrine in the Holy City.
Spread your religion to seven cities.

greed.name: Greed
greed.text: Your smiths crave iron they do not have. Seize a source of it by any means.

war_chariots.name: War Chariots
war_chariots.text: Thunder across the plains. Build a host of war chariots.

reward.text: Your chariots are feared across the land. Choose your reward:

choices.text: All chariots gain Combat I.
Spread your religion to five cities.

elite_swords.name: Elite Swords
elite_swords.text: Forge a legion of master swordsmen.

reward.text: Your swordsmen are peerless. Choose your reward:

choices.text: All swordsmen gain City Raider I.
All melee units gain Drill I.

warships.name: Warships
warships.text: Rule the seas. Build a fleet of triremes.

reward.text: Your fleet commands the waves. Choose your reward:

choices.text: All triremes gain Combat I.
+2 commerce from every harbor you own.

guns_butter.name: Guns and Butter
guns_butter.text: Modernise your armies. Build a corps of musketmen.

reward.text: Your musketeers are battle-ready. Choose your reward:

choices.text: All musketmen gain the Pinch promotion.
The treasury swells by 400 gold.
A Golden Age of industry!

noble_knights.name: Noble Knights
noble_knights.text: Assemble an order of mounted knights.

reward.text: Your knights are the flower of chivalry. Choose your reward:

choices.text: All knights gain Flanking I.
Spread your religion across your realm.
A great priest settles in your capital.

overwhelm.name: Overwhelm
overwhelm.text: Build an unstoppable modern navy and air force: destroyers, battleships, carriers, and fighters.

reward.text: Your war machine is overwhelming. Choose your reward:

choices.text: All naval units gain Combat I.
+5 commerce from every harbor you own.
Champion a non-proliferation treaty (+attitude with all met).

corporate_expansion.name: Corporate Expansion
corporate_expansion.text: Your corporation eyes new markets. Spread it to eight new cities.

hostile_takeover.name: Hostile Takeover
hostile_takeover.text: Your corporation lacks the inputs it craves. Secure every resource it needs.
